# Paperclip Company Ops

Paperclip Company Ops is a SaaS workspace for Paperclip AI.

Website: https://paperclipcompany.space/
Docs pattern reference: https://github.com/clauxel/MiroFish
Primary keyword: Paperclip AI
Type: SaaS
Default plan: team

Public boundary: docs-only repository; no production source code or secrets.
